tasks.title: Initialize Next.js project with TypeScript
tasks.description: DO NOT use create-next-app (it hangs in non-interactive mode). Instead, manually create: package.json with next/react/react-dom deps and scripts (dev, build, start), tsconfig.json with strict mode and @/ path alias pointing to src/, next.config.js (empty config), .gitignore (node_modules, .next, .env, data/, uploads/, .ralph/.server-env), and the directory structure: src/app/, src/components/, src/lib/, src/hooks/, src/types/, data/, uploads/. Then run npm install.

tasks.title: Install all project dependencies
tasks.description: Install production deps: @mui/material @emotion/react @emotion/styled @mui/icons-material socket.io socket.io-client prisma @prisma/client jsonwebtoken bcryptjs cookie uuid livekit-server-sdk @livekit/components-react. Install dev deps: @types/jsonwebtoken @types/bcryptjs @types/cookie @types/node @types/react @types/react-dom typescript.

tasks.title: Create Prisma schema with all models
tasks.description: Create prisma/schema.prisma with SQLite datasource (file:../data/discord.db). Define all models: User, Server, Channel, Message, ServerMember with all fields, relations, indexes, cascade rules, and @@unique constraints per the database spec.

tasks.title: Run initial Prisma migration and create DB client
tasks.description: Run npx prisma migrate dev --name init to generate the initial migration. Create src/lib/db.ts exporting a singleton PrismaClient instance (with global caching for dev hot-reload).

tasks.title: Implement auth helper and JWT utilities
tasks.description: Create src/lib/auth.ts with functions: signToken(userId, username) returns a JWT with 7-day expiry, verifyToken(token) returns decoded payload or null, getAuthUser(req) reads the 'token' cookie from request headers, verifies it, and returns { userId, username } or null. Uses JWT_SECRET env var.

tasks.title: Implement registration API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts — POST handler. Validate username (3-20 chars alphanumeric), email format, password (min 6 chars). Hash password with bcryptjs (10 rounds). Create User in DB via Prisma. Sign JWT, set httpOnly cookie, return { user: { id, username, email } }.

tasks.title: Implement login API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts — POST handler. Accept { email, password }. Look up user by email via Prisma. Compare password with bcryptjs. If valid, sign JWT, set httpOnly cookie, return user object. If invalid, return 401.

tasks.title: Implement logout and current user API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts — POST handler that clears the token cookie. Create src/app/api/auth/me/route.ts — GET handler that calls getAuthUser(req), returns user object from DB (id, username, email, avatarUrl) or 401.

tasks.title: Create ThemeRegistry and useThemeMode hook
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useThemeMode.tsx — ThemeModeProvider context with dark/light toggle, localStorage persistence. Primary #5865F2, dark bg #121212/paper #1e1e1e, light bg #f5f5f5/paper #ffffff. Create src/components/common/ThemeRegistry.tsx wrapping ThemeProvider + CssBaseline. Same pattern as MarchMadness.

tasks.title: Create useAuth hook and AuthProvider
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useAuth.tsx — AuthProvider context. On mount calls /api/auth/me to check session. Exposes { user, login, register, logout, loading }. login() POSTs to /api/auth/login, register() POSTs to /api/auth/register, logout() POSTs to /api/auth/logout. Same pattern as MarchMadness.

tasks.title: Create root layout with providers
tasks.description: Create src/app/layout.tsx wrapping children in ThemeRegistry > AuthProvider. Create src/app/globals.css with minimal base styles (body margin 0, box-sizing border-box).

tasks.title: Build login and registration UI
tasks.description: Create src/components/auth/AuthForm.tsx — MUI Card with toggle between Login and Register modes. Email + password fields (plus username for register). Uses useAuth hook for submit. Shows validation errors via MUI Alert. Create src/app/page.tsx — if authenticated redirect to /servers, otherwise render AuthForm.

tasks.title: Create server.js with Next.js wrapper and webhook handler
tasks.description: Create server.js at project root. Wrap Next.js with custom HTTP server (same pattern as MarchMadness server.js). Add /api/webhook POST handler with HMAC SHA-256 signature verification using WEBHOOK_SECRET. Listen on PORT env var (default 3003). This is needed BEFORE Socket.io — Socket.io gets added later.

tasks.title: Create deploy_webhook.sh
tasks.description: Create deploy_webhook.sh at project root — matching MarchMadness pattern: lock file, git fetch/reset origin main, conditional npm install if package.json changed, npx prisma migrate deploy, rm -rf .next, npm run build, pm2 restart discord-alt. Log to /var/log/webhook_deploy_discord.log.

tasks.title: Create .env.example, set up nginx, and do first deploy
tasks.description: Create .env.example with all required vars. SSH into server, set up nginx config for discord.edgecdec.com proxying to localhost:3003 (match pattern of other sites). Clone repo to /var/www/DiscordAlternative, npm install, prisma migrate, build, start with pm2. Verify curl returns 200. Generate JWT_SECRET and add to server .env.

tasks.title: Implement create server API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/route.ts — POST handler. Requires auth. Accepts { name, imageUrl? }. Creates Server with uuid inviteCode. Creates default 'general' TEXT channel. Creates ServerMember with role OWNER. Returns full server object.

tasks.title: Implement list user servers API route
tasks.description: Add GET handler to src/app/api/servers/route.ts — returns all servers the authenticated user is a member of, including channels and member count via Prisma include/count.

tasks.title: Implement server detail API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/route.ts — GET handler. Validates user is a member. Returns full server with channels and members (including user info).

tasks.title: Create maintenance.html page with minigame
tasks.description: Create maintenance.html at project root — a self-contained HTML page (no external deps) shown by nginx when the app is down (502/503/504). Include a fun minigame (e.g. simple snake, pong, or click counter) to keep users entertained during deploys. Style it to match the app theme (dark bg #121212, primary #5865F2). nginx is already configured to serve it via error_page directive. Same pattern as MarchMadness maintenance.html.

tasks.title: Build server sidebar component
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/ServerSidebar.tsx — narrow vertical Box (~72px) showing server icons as MUI Avatar with first letter of name. Active server highlighted with colored left border. Add icon button at bottom for creating servers. Clicking navigates to /servers/[serverId].

tasks.title: Fix: database tables missing on production server
tasks.description: URGENT: The production server at discord.edgecdec.com returns 'The table main.User does not exist' when registering. The Prisma migration was not applied to the production DB. SSH into the server, diagnose why the tables are missing (check data/discord.db, check prisma config datasource URL, check if prisma migrate deploy actually creates tables). Fix it so the migration runs correctly. Verify by curling the register endpoint. Also ensure deploy_webhook.sh runs prisma migrate deploy correctly on future deploys.

tasks.title: Create seed script with test user and test credentials file
tasks.description: Create a seed script (seed.js or similar) that creates a test user in the DB if it doesn't exist (username: testbot, password: testpass123). Run it on the server via SSH. Create ~/.config/discord-alt-creds.env on the LOCAL machine with TESTBOT_USER=testbot and TESTBOT_PASS=testpass123. This file is used by Nova Act tests to authenticate without hardcoding credentials. Also create an admin test user (username: ralphbot, password: ralphpass123) and add ADMIN_USER/ADMIN_PASS to the creds file.

tasks.title: Set up Nova Act browser testing for UI verification
tasks.description: For all future UI tasks, after deploying to the remote server, write a temporary Nova Act test script to verify the feature works in a real browser against the LIVE site (https://discord.edgecdec.com). Pattern: 1) source ~/.config/discord-alt-creds.env. 2) Get auth cookie via curl against the live site: curl -s -c /tmp/discord-cookie.txt -X POST https://discord.edgecdec.com/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"$TESTBOT_USER","password":"$TESTBOT_PASS"}'. 3) Start NovaAct at https://discord.edgecdec.com with the cookie file — no login steps needed. 4) Use short one-sentence prompts per act() call. 5) Print PASS/FAIL. 6) Run with /opt/homebrew/bin/python3.13. 7) Delete temp script after verification. Add this pattern to .ralph/specs/anti-patterns.md under a 'Nova Act Testing' section so all future iterations follow it. Reference ~/TestProjects/TestApplication/PROMPT.md for the full cookie-based auth bypass pattern.

tasks.title: Create constants.ts with size limits and retrofit existing routes
tasks.description: Create src/lib/constants.ts with all size limits: USERNAME_MIN=3, USERNAME_MAX=20, PASSWORD_MIN=6, PASSWORD_MAX=128, SERVER_NAME_MIN=1, SERVER_NAME_MAX=50, CHANNEL_NAME_MIN=1, CHANNEL_NAME_MAX=50, MESSAGE_MAX=2000, FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_BYTES=5*1024*1024, AVATAR_URL_MAX=512, MESSAGES_PER_PAGE=50. Update existing API routes (register, login, create server) to import and use these constants instead of hardcoded values. Update AuthForm.tsx to set maxLength on TextFields.

tasks.title: Build create server dialog
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/CreateServerDialog.tsx — MUI Dialog with TextField for server name. On submit POSTs to /api/servers. On success navigates to the new server. Triggered by Add button in ServerSidebar.

tasks.title: Implement create channel API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/channels/route.ts — POST handler. Accepts { name, type }. Validates user is OWNER or ADMIN of the server. Creates channel via Prisma. Returns channel object.

tasks.title: Implement update and delete channel API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/channels/[channelId]/route.ts — PATCH handler accepts { name? }, validates OWNER/ADMIN. DELETE handler validates OWNER/ADMIN and prevents deleting the last TEXT channel in the server.

tasks.title: Build channel list panel component
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/ChannelPanel.tsx — ~240px Box. Server name Typography header. Channel list using MUI List/ListItemButton grouped by type: text channels with Tag icon, voice with VolumeUp icon. Active channel highlighted. Add Channel button for OWNER/ADMIN (opens a simple dialog).

tasks.title: Build user info panel in channel panel
tasks.description: Add a user info section at the bottom of ChannelPanel — shows current user Avatar, username Typography, theme toggle IconButton (DarkMode/LightMode), and settings IconButton. Uses useAuth for user data and useThemeMode for toggle.

tasks.title: Create the three-column layout shell and server pages
tasks.description: Create src/app/servers/[serverId]/layout.tsx — flexbox row with ServerSidebar (left), ChannelPanel (middle), children (right, flex:1). Create src/app/servers/[serverId]/page.tsx — reads server channels, redirects to first TEXT channel. Create src/app/servers/[serverId]/channels/[channelId]/page.tsx — placeholder showing channel name.

tasks.title: Implement get messages API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/channels/[channelId]/messages/route.ts — GET handler. Validates user is member of the channel's server. Returns messages with author info (id, username, avatarUrl), ordered by createdAt desc, cursor-based pagination (take 50, optional cursor query param).

tasks.title: Implement create message API route
tasks.description: Add POST handler to src/app/api/channels/[channelId]/messages/route.ts — accepts { content, fileUrl? }. Validates user is member. Creates message via Prisma with authorId. Returns message with author info.

tasks.title: Implement edit and delete message API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/messages/[messageId]/route.ts — PATCH handler accepts { content }, validates author owns message. DELETE handler validates author or server admin, sets deleted=true (soft delete). Both return updated message.

tasks.title: Create Socket.io type definitions
tasks.description: Create src/types/socket.ts — define ServerToClientEvents interface (message:new, message:updated, message:deleted, presence:online, presence:offline, typing:start, typing:stop) and ClientToServerEvents interface (channel:join, channel:leave, message:create, message:update, message:delete, typing:start, typing:stop). Define payload type for each event.

tasks.title: Add Socket.io to server.js with auth
tasks.description: Update existing server.js to attach Socket.io Server to the HTTP server. On connection: parse JWT from cookie in handshake headers, verify with auth helper, attach userId/username to socket, reject if invalid. server.js already handles Next.js requests and webhook — just add Socket.io on top.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io channel join/leave handlers
tasks.description: In server.js, implement channel:join handler — validate user is member of the channel's server via Prisma query, join socket to room 'channel:<channelId>'. Implement channel:leave — leave the room.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io message:create handler
tasks.description: In server.js, implement message:create handler — validate membership, persist message to DB via Prisma (with authorId from socket), query back with author include, broadcast message:new to channel room.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io message:update and message:delete handlers
tasks.description: In server.js, implement message:update — validate author owns message, update content in DB, broadcast message:updated to channel room. Implement message:delete — validate author or admin, soft-delete in DB, broadcast message:deleted with { messageId } to channel room.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io presence tracking
tasks.description: In server.js, maintain in-memory Map<userId, Set<socketId>> for online tracking. On connection, add to map, query user's servers, broadcast presence:online { userId, username } to those server rooms. On disconnect, remove from map, if no sockets left broadcast presence:offline { userId }.

tasks.title: Implement Socket.io typing indicators
tasks.description: In server.js, implement typing:start handler — broadcast { userId, username, channelId } to channel room excluding sender. Implement typing:stop — same broadcast pattern excluding sender.

tasks.title: Create useSocket hook
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useSocket.ts — SocketProvider context. Connects to Socket.io when user is authenticated (from useAuth). Typed with ClientToServerEvents/ServerToClientEvents. Auto-reconnects. Exposes socket instance and joinChannel/leaveChannel helpers.

tasks.title: Build MessageList component with initial fetch
tasks.description: Create src/components/chat/MessageList.tsx — accepts channelId prop. On mount fetches messages from /api/channels/[channelId]/messages. Renders scrollable MUI Box. Each message shows Avatar, username Typography, timestamp, content Typography. Auto-scrolls to bottom on load.

tasks.title: Add real-time message listeners to MessageList
tasks.description: Update MessageList to listen for message:new (append to list, auto-scroll), message:updated (update in place), message:deleted (mark as deleted) via useSocket. Messages update in real-time without refresh.

tasks.title: Add cursor-based pagination to MessageList
tasks.description: Update MessageList — detect scroll to top, fetch older messages using cursor param from the oldest message ID. Prepend to list while maintaining scroll position. Show loading indicator while fetching. Stop when no more messages returned.

tasks.title: Build MessageInput component
tasks.description: Create src/components/chat/MessageInput.tsx — MUI TextField with Send IconButton. On submit emits message:create via socket with { channelId, content }. Enter sends, Shift+Enter newline. Clears input on send.

tasks.title: Add typing indicator emission to MessageInput
tasks.description: Update MessageInput — emit typing:start on keypress (debounced, max once per 2 seconds). Emit typing:stop when user stops typing for 3 seconds or sends message.

tasks.title: Build TypingIndicator component
tasks.description: Create src/components/chat/TypingIndicator.tsx — listens for typing:start/typing:stop via useSocket. Shows 'Username is typing...' or 'X users are typing...' as small Typography below MessageInput. Auto-clears after 4 second timeout per user.

tasks.title: Assemble the text channel page
tasks.description: Update src/app/servers/[serverId]/channels/[channelId]/page.tsx — for TEXT channels: show channel name header with # icon, render MessageList, TypingIndicator, MessageInput. Call joinChannel on mount, leaveChannel on unmount/channel change.

tasks.title: Implement invite code API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/invite/route.ts — GET handler returns { inviteCode } for members only. Create src/app/api/servers/invite/[code]/route.ts — POST handler joins server via invite code, creates ServerMember GUEST role, rejects if already member.

tasks.title: Build invite page
tasks.description: Create src/app/invite/[code]/page.tsx — looks up server by invite code, shows server name and Join button. On click POSTs to /api/servers/invite/[code], redirects to server on success. If already member, redirects directly.

tasks.title: Implement list members API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/members/route.ts — GET handler. Validates user is member. Returns all ServerMembers with user info (id, username, avatarUrl) and roles.

tasks.title: Implement change role and kick member API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/members/[memberId]/route.ts — PATCH handler changes role (OWNER only). DELETE handler kicks member (OWNER/ADMIN only, cannot kick OWNER).

tasks.title: Build online members sidebar
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/MemberList.tsx — right sidebar showing server members grouped by role (OWNER, ADMIN, MODERATOR, GUEST). Green/gray dot for online/offline status via presence events from useSocket. Fetches members from /api/servers/[serverId]/members.

tasks.title: Bug fix: messages require page refresh to appear
tasks.description: BUG: New messages sent by other users do not appear in real-time — the page must be refreshed to see them. Diagnose the full Socket.io chain: 1) Check server.js message:create handler actually broadcasts message:new to the channel room. 2) Check MessageList subscribes to message:new via useSocket. 3) Check the socket actually joins the channel room on mount (channel:join event). 4) Check useSocket connects successfully (verify JWT cookie is sent in handshake). 5) Test with two browser tabs — send a message in one, verify it appears in the other without refresh. Use pm2 logs on the server to see if socket events are firing. Fix whatever is broken.

tasks.title: Implement LiveKit token generation API route
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/livekit/token/route.ts — POST handler. Requires auth. Accepts { channelId }. Validates membership and channel type VOICE/VIDEO. Generates LiveKit access token with livekit-server-sdk: room channel:<channelId>, identity user:<userId>, grants roomJoin/canPublish/canSubscribe, 1h expiry. Returns { token }.

tasks.title: Build VoiceChannel component
tasks.description: Create src/components/voice/VoiceChannel.tsx — accepts channelId. Fetches token from /api/livekit/token. Wraps in LiveKitRoom provider connecting to NEXT_PUBLIC_LIVEKIT_URL. Renders participant list with audio tracks via @livekit/components-react. Mute/unmute and disconnect MUI IconButtons.

tasks.title: Wire voice channel into channel page
tasks.description: Update channel page — check channel type. If VOICE or VIDEO, render VoiceChannel component instead of MessageList/MessageInput. Show channel name with VolumeUp icon.

tasks.title: Implement update server API route
tasks.description: Add PATCH handler to src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/route.ts — accepts { name?, imageUrl? }. Validates user is OWNER or ADMIN. Updates server via Prisma. Returns updated server.

tasks.title: Implement delete server API route
tasks.description: Add DELETE handler to src/app/api/servers/[serverId]/route.ts — validates user is OWNER. Deletes server (cascades to channels, messages, members). Returns 204.

tasks.title: Build server settings dialog — general tab
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/ServerSettings.tsx — MUI Dialog triggered from settings icon in ChannelPanel. General tab: rename server TextField, display invite code with copy-to-clipboard button. Calls PATCH /api/servers/[serverId] on save.

tasks.title: Add members tab to server settings
tasks.description: Add Members tab to ServerSettings dialog — list members with role badges. OWNER sees role change dropdown and kick button per member. Calls PATCH/DELETE on /api/servers/[serverId]/members/[memberId].

tasks.title: Add danger zone tab to server settings
tasks.description: Add Danger Zone tab to ServerSettings — red-styled delete server button with confirmation dialog. Only visible to OWNER. Calls DELETE /api/servers/[serverId], redirects to /servers on success.

tasks.title: Add mobile responsive layout with Drawer
tasks.description: Update the three-column layout — on screens <768px, hide ServerSidebar and ChannelPanel, show hamburger Menu IconButton in channel header. Clicking opens MUI Drawer containing both panels. Same pattern as MarchMadness mobile nav.

tasks.title: Create user profile API routes
tasks.description: Create GET /api/users/[username] — public profile (id, username, avatarUrl, createdAt). Create PATCH /api/auth/profile — authenticated, accepts { username?, avatarUrl? }. Validate username against constants. Create PATCH /api/auth/password — accepts { currentPassword, newPassword }, verify current, hash new.

tasks.title: Build user profile page
tasks.description: Create src/app/profile/[username]/page.tsx — shows user avatar, username, join date. If viewing own profile, show edit button. Create src/components/common/ProfileDialog.tsx — MUI Dialog to edit username, avatar, and change password. Accessible from user info panel in ChannelPanel.

tasks.title: Track last-read message per channel per user
tasks.description: Add a ChannelRead model to Prisma: id, userId, channelId, lastReadMessageId, updatedAt. @@unique([userId, channelId]). Create API route PATCH /api/channels/[channelId]/read — updates lastReadMessageId to the latest message. Call this when user views a channel.

tasks.title: Add unread indicators to channel list and server sidebar
tasks.description: Update ChannelPanel to show bold channel name and dot indicator when channel has messages newer than lastReadMessageId. Update ServerSidebar to show notification dot on server icon if any channel in that server has unreads. Fetch unread status from a new GET /api/servers/[serverId]/unreads endpoint.

tasks.title: Implement file upload API route
tasks.description: Create POST /api/upload — accepts multipart form data, saves file to uploads/ directory with a unique filename (uuid + original extension). Validate file size against FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_BYTES from constants. Return { url: '/uploads/filename' }. Serve uploads/ directory as static files from server.js.

tasks.title: Add file attachment button to MessageInput
tasks.description: Update MessageInput to include an AttachFile IconButton. On click, open file picker. Upload file to /api/upload, then send message with fileUrl. Show upload progress indicator.

tasks.title: Display image attachments inline in messages
tasks.description: Update MessageList message rendering — if message has fileUrl, detect if it's an image (jpg/png/gif/webp) and render inline with max-width 400px. For non-image files, show a download link with filename and file size.

tasks.title: Create message reactions database model and API
tasks.description: Add Reaction model to Prisma: id, emoji (String), userId, messageId, createdAt. @@unique([userId, messageId, emoji]). Create POST /api/messages/[messageId]/reactions — accepts { emoji }, toggles reaction (add if not exists, remove if exists). Create GET /api/messages/[messageId]/reactions — returns reactions grouped by emoji with count and whether current user reacted.

tasks.title: Add reaction UI to messages
tasks.description: Update message rendering in MessageList — show reaction chips below message content (emoji + count, highlighted if current user reacted). Add a small emoji picker on hover/click (smiley face icon). Clicking a reaction chip toggles it. Broadcast reaction changes via Socket.io events reaction:add and reaction:remove.

tasks.title: Add reply support to messages database and API
tasks.description: Add replyToId field (optional String) to Message model, self-relation to Message. Update POST /api/channels/[channelId]/messages to accept optional replyToId. Update GET messages to include replyTo message (id, content snippet, author username) when present.

tasks.title: Build reply UI in chat
tasks.description: Add reply button to messages (on hover). Clicking sets a reply-to bar above MessageInput showing the quoted message snippet with an X to cancel. Sending includes replyToId. In MessageList, render replied-to messages with a small quote block above the message content.

tasks.title: Implement @mention parsing and highlighting
tasks.description: When a message contains @username, the server should check if that user is a member of the server. In MessageList, parse @username patterns and render them as highlighted styled spans (primary color, clickable). Add a Socket.io event mention:notify that alerts the mentioned user.

tasks.title: Add @mention autocomplete to MessageInput
tasks.description: When user types @ in MessageInput, show a dropdown of server members filtered by what they've typed so far. Selecting a member inserts @username into the message. Use MUI Popper or Autocomplete positioned above the input.

tasks.title: Add link preview rendering to messages
tasks.description: In MessageList, detect URLs in message content using regex. Render them as clickable links. For the first URL in a message, show a simple preview card below the message with the URL domain and a link icon. Keep it lightweight — no server-side fetching of metadata for now.

tasks.title: Add emoji picker to MessageInput
tasks.description: Add a smiley face IconButton next to the send button in MessageInput. On click, show a popover with a grid of common emoji (use a static list of ~100 popular emoji, no external library). Clicking an emoji inserts it at cursor position in the input.

tasks.title: Add channel categories to database and API
tasks.description: Add ChannelCategory model to Prisma: id, name, serverId, position (Int). Add optional categoryId to Channel model. Create POST /api/servers/[serverId]/categories — create category. Create PATCH/DELETE for categories. Update channel creation to accept optional categoryId.

tasks.title: Render channel categories in ChannelPanel
tasks.description: Update ChannelPanel to group channels under collapsible category headers. Uncategorized channels appear at top. Categories are collapsible (click header to toggle). Show channel count per category.

tasks.title: Build first-time user onboarding flow
tasks.description: When user has no servers (GET /api/servers returns empty), show a welcome page instead of redirecting. Two options: 'Create a Server' and 'Join a Server' (enter invite code). Friendly copy and icons. After creating/joining, redirect to the server.

tasks.title: Implement message search API
tasks.description: Create GET /api/servers/[serverId]/search?q=query — full-text search across all messages in the server the user has access to. Return matching messages with channel name, author, timestamp. Paginated. Use Prisma contains filter on content field.

tasks.title: Build message search UI
tasks.description: Add a search IconButton in the channel header. Opens a search panel/dialog with a TextField. Results show message snippets with channel name and author. Clicking a result navigates to that channel and scrolls to the message.

tasks.title: Add keyboard shortcuts
tasks.description: Escape closes any open dialog/drawer. Ctrl+K (or Cmd+K on Mac) opens a quick-switch dialog to search and jump to channels. Focus message input when typing in a channel view (if no dialog is open). Add a small keyboard shortcut hint in the UI.

tasks.title: Add user status to database and API
tasks.description: Add status field to User model: String, default 'online'. Valid values: online, away, dnd, offline. Create PATCH /api/auth/status — accepts { status }. Broadcast status changes via Socket.io presence:status event. Show status as colored dot on user avatars (green=online, yellow=away, red=dnd, gray=offline).

tasks.title: Build user status selector UI
tasks.description: Add a status dot next to the user avatar in the user info panel at bottom of ChannelPanel. Clicking opens a small menu to select status (Online, Away, Do Not Disturb, Invisible). Update MemberList to show status dots on all members.

tasks.title: Create direct message database model and API
tasks.description: Add DirectMessage model to Prisma: id, content, fileUrl, senderId, receiverId, createdAt, updatedAt. Create GET /api/dm/[userId] — get DM history with a user (paginated). Create POST /api/dm/[userId] — send a DM. Add Socket.io events dm:new for real-time delivery.

tasks.title: Build direct messages UI
tasks.description: Add a DM section to ServerSidebar (above server list) with a chat bubble icon. Clicking shows a list of recent DM conversations. Clicking a conversation opens a DM view (reuse MessageList and MessageInput components). Show unread DM indicator on the icon.

tasks.title: Create audit log database model and API
tasks.description: Add AuditLog model to Prisma: id, serverId, userId, action (String: member_kick, member_role_change, channel_create, channel_delete, message_delete, server_update), targetId, details (String, JSON), createdAt. Log actions automatically in the relevant API routes. Create GET /api/servers/[serverId]/audit-log — OWNER/ADMIN only, paginated.

tasks.title: Build audit log UI in server settings
tasks.description: Add an Audit Log tab to ServerSettings dialog (OWNER/ADMIN only). Shows a chronological list of actions: who did what, when. Each entry shows user avatar, action description, and timestamp. Paginated with load more.

tasks.title: Install and configure LiveKit server on production
tasks.description: URGENT: Voice channels show 'Failed to connect to voice server' because LiveKit is not installed. SSH into the server and: 1) Download the LiveKit server binary for linux amd64 from https://github.com/livekit/livekit/releases (use curl). 2) Move to /usr/local/bin/livekit-server, chmod +x. 3) Generate API keys: livekit-server generate-keys. 4) Create /etc/livekit.yaml with the keys, bind to 0.0.0.0, ports 7880/7881. 5) Start with pm2: pm2 start livekit-server -- --config /etc/livekit.yaml --name livekit && pm2 save. 6) Add LIVEKIT_API_KEY, LIVEKIT_API_SECRET, and NEXT_PUBLIC_LIVEKIT_URL=wss://discord.edgecdec.com:7880 to /var/www/DiscordAlternative/.env. 7) Open ports 7880 and 7881/udp in the firewall (ufw allow 7880 && ufw allow 7881/udp). 8) Restart discord-alt: pm2 restart discord-alt. 9) Verify voice channel works by checking pm2 logs for livekit and curling localhost:7880.

tasks.title: Implement slow mode for channels
tasks.description: Add slowModeSeconds field to Channel model (Int, default 0, 0 means disabled). Create PATCH /api/channels/[channelId] to accept slowModeSeconds. In the Socket.io message:create handler, check if user's last message in the channel was within the slow mode window — reject if too soon. Return error with seconds remaining.

tasks.title: Build slow mode UI
tasks.description: In MessageInput, if the channel has slow mode enabled and user recently sent a message, disable the input and show a countdown timer. In channel settings (accessible from channel header), OWNER/ADMIN can set slow mode duration (off, 5s, 10s, 30s, 1m, 5m). Show a clock icon in the channel header when slow mode is active.

tasks.title: Implement message pinning API
tasks.description: Add pinned Boolean field to Message model (default false). Create POST /api/messages/[messageId]/pin — toggles pinned status. OWNER/ADMIN/MODERATOR only. Create GET /api/channels/[channelId]/pins — returns all pinned messages in a channel. Broadcast pin:toggle via Socket.io.

tasks.title: Persist voice channel connection across page navigation
tasks.description: BUG: Navigating away from a voice channel disconnects you. In Discord, voice persists while you browse text channels. Fix: lift the LiveKit connection state out of the channel page into a global context/provider (e.g. VoiceProvider wrapping the app in layout.tsx). Store the active voice channelId and token in context. The LiveKitRoom component renders in the layout, not the channel page. Show a small 'Connected to Voice' bar at the bottom of ChannelPanel showing the voice channel name, a disconnect button, and mic/deafen toggles — so the user can control voice from anywhere. Clicking the voice channel name navigates back to it.

tasks.title: Add noise gate / voice activity detection to voice channels
tasks.description: BUG: Background noise is transmitted in voice channels. Enable LiveKit's built-in noise suppression by setting audioCaptureDefaults in the LiveKitRoom component: { noiseSuppression: true, autoGainControl: true, echoCancellation: true }. Additionally, configure voice activity detection so the mic only transmits when the user is actually speaking — set publishDefaults with dtx (discontinuous transmission) enabled. This prevents constant background noise from being broadcast.

tasks.title: Preserve invite redirect through registration flow
tasks.description: BUG: If a user clicks an invite link (e.g. /invite/ABC123) but isn't logged in, they get redirected to the login page. After registering, they land on the home page instead of being taken to the invite. Fix: when redirecting unauthenticated users to login, store the original URL (e.g. in a query param like /login?redirect=/invite/ABC123 or in sessionStorage). After successful login/register, redirect to that stored URL instead of the default home page.

tasks.title: Fix image/file upload failing
tasks.description: BUG: Image uploads fail when sending messages. Diagnose: 1) Check /api/upload route exists and works — curl a test upload from the server. 2) Check the uploads/ directory exists on the server and is writable. 3) Check server.js serves the uploads/ directory as static files. 4) Check nginx passes requests to /uploads/ correctly. 5) Check file size limits match constants.ts FILE_UPLOAD_MAX_BYTES. 6) Check the MessageInput attachment flow actually calls /api/upload before sending the message. Fix whatever is broken and verify by uploading an image in chat.

tasks.title: Build pinned messages UI
tasks.description: Add a pin icon in the channel header. Clicking opens a drawer/panel showing pinned messages. Add a pin button on message hover (for permitted roles). Pinned messages show a small pin icon. Notify channel via Socket.io when a message is pinned/unpinned.

tasks.title: Show edit indicator on edited messages
tasks.description: In MessageList, if a message's updatedAt differs from createdAt and it's not deleted, show a small '(edited)' label next to the timestamp. Tooltip on hover shows the edit timestamp.

tasks.title: Implement custom server emoji upload
tasks.description: Add ServerEmoji model: id, name (String, unique per server), imageUrl, serverId, uploadedById, createdAt. Create POST /api/servers/[serverId]/emoji — upload custom emoji image (max 256KB, 128x128). Create GET /api/servers/[serverId]/emoji — list all. Create DELETE. OWNER/ADMIN only for upload/delete.

tasks.title: Integrate custom emoji into emoji picker and messages
tasks.description: Add a 'Server' tab to the emoji picker showing custom emoji for the current server. When a custom emoji is used in a message (syntax :emoji_name:), render the image inline. Parse and display in MessageList.

tasks.title: Implement thread creation from messages
tasks.description: Add Thread model: id, name, parentMessageId, channelId, creatorId, createdAt, archived Boolean. A thread is a sub-conversation spawned from a message. Create POST /api/messages/[messageId]/thread — creates a thread. Messages in a thread have a threadId field. Create GET /api/threads/[threadId]/messages.

tasks.title: Build thread UI
tasks.description: Add a 'Create Thread' button on message hover. Clicking opens a side panel showing the thread conversation (reuse MessageList/MessageInput). Show thread reply count on the parent message. Thread panel slides in from the right, overlaying or beside the main chat.

tasks.title: Show who's in voice channels
tasks.description: In ChannelPanel, under each voice channel, show avatars/usernames of users currently connected. Use LiveKit room participant list or track via Socket.io events voice:join/voice:leave. Show participant count next to the channel name.

tasks.title: Add notification sounds
tasks.description: Play a subtle notification sound when: a new message arrives in a channel you're not viewing, someone mentions you, you receive a DM. Use the Web Audio API with a small embedded sound. Add a mute toggle in user settings (persist to localStorage). No sound for your own messages.

tasks.title: Add markdown rendering to messages
tasks.description: Parse message content as basic markdown: **bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~, `inline code`, ```code blocks```. Use a lightweight parser (regex-based, no external library). Render in MessageList with appropriate MUI Typography styles. Keep it simple — no full markdown spec.

tasks.title: Add channel topic/description
tasks.description: Add topic field to Channel model (String, optional, max 1024 chars). Create PATCH /api/channels/[channelId] to accept { topic }. OWNER/ADMIN only.

tasks.title: Display channel topic in header
tasks.description: Show the channel topic as a subtitle in the channel header area. Truncate with ellipsis if long. Clicking expands to show full topic. Editable inline for OWNER/ADMIN.

tasks.title: Implement user ban API
tasks.description: Add BannedUser model: id, userId, serverId, reason (optional String), bannedById, createdAt. @@unique([userId, serverId]). Create POST /api/servers/[serverId]/bans — ban a user (OWNER/ADMIN). Removes their ServerMember and prevents rejoin via invite. Create DELETE to unban. Create GET to list bans.

tasks.title: Build ban management UI
tasks.description: Add ban option to member context menu in MemberList and server settings members tab. Show confirmation dialog with optional reason field. Add a 'Bans' tab in server settings showing banned users with unban button. OWNER/ADMIN only.

tasks.title: Implement read receipts
tasks.description: When a user views a channel, broadcast read:update { userId, channelId, lastReadMessageId } to other users in that channel via Socket.io. In MessageList, show small avatars of users who have read up to each message (only show for the last few messages to avoid clutter).

tasks.title: Implement server icon upload
tasks.description: Update server creation and settings to allow uploading a server icon image. Use the existing /api/upload endpoint. Store the URL in Server.imageUrl. In ServerSidebar, show the uploaded image in the Avatar instead of the first letter. Crop/resize to fit the circular avatar.

tasks.title: Add drag-and-drop file upload to chat
tasks.description: Add a drop zone overlay to the channel view. When user drags a file over the chat area, show a visual indicator. On drop, upload via /api/upload and send as a message with fileUrl. Support multiple files (one message per file).

tasks.title: Add delete confirmation dialog for messages
tasks.description: When clicking delete on a message, show a MUI Dialog confirming the action with the message content preview. 'Delete' button in red. Cancel to dismiss. Prevents accidental deletions.

tasks.title: Implement leave server functionality
tasks.description: Create POST /api/servers/[serverId]/leave — removes the authenticated user's ServerMember. Cannot leave if you're the OWNER (must transfer or delete). Add a 'Leave Server' option in server settings or right-click server icon context menu. Redirect to home after leaving.

tasks.title: Implement per-channel notification settings
tasks.description: Add ChannelNotificationSetting model: id, userId, channelId, muted Boolean (default false). @@unique([userId, channelId]). Create PATCH /api/channels/[channelId]/notifications — toggle mute. Muted channels don't trigger notification sounds or unread indicators. Add a bell/mute icon toggle in the channel header.

tasks.title: Support paste-to-upload images in chat
tasks.description: Listen for paste events in MessageInput. If clipboard contains an image (e.g. screenshot), upload it via /api/upload and attach to the message. Show a preview before sending. Common workflow: screenshot → Cmd+V → send.

tasks.title: Show Socket.io connection status
tasks.description: Show a small banner or indicator when the Socket.io connection is lost (e.g. yellow bar: 'Reconnecting...'). Auto-dismiss when reconnected. Show 'Connected' briefly on reconnect. Helps users understand why messages might not be appearing in real-time.

tasks.title: Auto-scroll to newest messages and 'jump to bottom' button
tasks.description: When new messages arrive and user is scrolled to the bottom, auto-scroll to show them. If user has scrolled up (reading history), do NOT auto-scroll — instead show a floating 'Jump to latest' button at the bottom of MessageList. Clicking it scrolls to bottom. Show unread count on the button.

tasks.title: Add copy invite link button to server UI
tasks.description: Add a prominent 'Invite People' button in the ChannelPanel header or server settings. Clicking copies the full invite URL (https://discord.edgecdec.com/invite/CODE) to clipboard. Show a Snackbar confirmation 'Invite link copied!'. This is how users actually share servers.

tasks.title: Add message context menu (right-click / hover actions)
tasks.description: On message hover, show a small action bar with icon buttons: Reply, React (emoji), Pin (if permitted), Edit (if author), Delete (if author/admin). On right-click, show a MUI Menu with the same options plus 'Copy Text'. This is the primary way users interact with messages.

tasks.title: Implement channel reordering
tasks.description: Add position (Int) field to Channel model. Channels display in position order in ChannelPanel. Create PATCH /api/servers/[serverId]/channels/reorder — accepts array of { channelId, position }. OWNER/ADMIN only. In ChannelPanel, allow drag-to-reorder or up/down buttons.

tasks.title: Show who reacted on reaction tooltip
tasks.description: When hovering over a reaction chip on a message, show a MUI Tooltip listing the usernames who reacted with that emoji. Clicking the chip still toggles your own reaction.

tasks.title: Improve message timestamps and date separators
tasks.description: Show relative timestamps on messages ('2m ago', '1h ago', 'Yesterday at 3:45 PM'). On hover, show full date/time in a tooltip. Add date separator bars between messages from different days ('March 25, 2026'). Group consecutive messages from the same author within 5 minutes (compact mode — no repeated avatar/name).

tasks.title: Handle failed message sends gracefully
tasks.description: If a message:create emission fails (socket disconnected, server error), show the message in red/italic with a retry button. Don't silently lose messages. Show a toast/snackbar for transient errors. Queue messages if socket is temporarily disconnected and resend on reconnect.

tasks.title: Add 'Join Server' dialog with invite code input
tasks.description: Add a 'Join Server' button in ServerSidebar (next to Create Server). Opens a MUI Dialog with a TextField to paste an invite code or full invite URL. Parses the code from the URL if pasted. Calls the join API. On success navigates to the server.

tasks.title: Add loading skeletons and spinners throughout the app
tasks.description: Add MUI Skeleton placeholders while data loads: message list (skeleton message bubbles), channel list (skeleton list items), server sidebar (skeleton circles), member list (skeleton rows). Show CircularProgress spinner on buttons during async operations (login, register, create server, send message). Replace blank screens with loading states.

tasks.title: Add error boundaries and error states
tasks.description: Wrap major sections (ServerSidebar, ChannelPanel, MessageList, VoiceChannel) in React error boundaries. Show a friendly error message with a 'Retry' button instead of a white screen. Add error states for failed API calls (e.g. 'Failed to load messages — click to retry').

tasks.title: Add favicon, dynamic page titles, and meta tags
tasks.description: Add a favicon (simple chat bubble icon or generate one). Set dynamic page titles: 'ServerName | #channel — Discord Alt' when in a channel, 'Discord Alternative' on login. Add basic meta description. Update the tab title with unread count: '(3) ServerName | #channel'.

tasks.title: Implement inline message editing
tasks.description: When clicking Edit on your own message, replace the message content with an inline TextField pre-filled with the current content. Enter saves (emits message:update), Escape cancels. Show 'editing...' indicator. Much better UX than a dialog.

tasks.title: Show member count and online count in server header
tasks.description: In the ChannelPanel server header area, show 'X members, Y online' as a small subtitle. Updates in real-time via presence events. Gives users a sense of the community size.

tasks.title: Preserve scroll position when switching channels
tasks.description: When switching between channels, remember the scroll position per channel. When returning to a channel, restore the scroll position instead of jumping to the bottom. Store in a React ref map keyed by channelId.

tasks.title: Add database backup script
tasks.description: Create a backup.sh script that copies data/discord.db to /var/www/DiscordAlternative/backups/ with a date-stamped filename. Keep only the last 2 backups, delete older ones. Add a cron job on the server to run it once per day at 3am. SQLite can be safely copied while the app is running if using WAL mode.

tasks.title: Enable SQLite WAL mode for concurrent reads
tasks.description: Configure Prisma/SQLite to use WAL (Write-Ahead Logging) mode. This allows concurrent reads while writing, which is important when Socket.io handlers and API routes hit the DB simultaneously. Add PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL to the database connection. Verify it's set on server startup.

tasks.title: Handle expired JWT tokens gracefully
tasks.description: When any API call returns 401, the useAuth hook should clear the user state and redirect to login. Currently if a JWT expires mid-session, the user sees broken API calls but stays on the page. Add a global fetch wrapper or interceptor that catches 401s. Show a toast: 'Session expired, please log in again'.

tasks.title: Sync missed messages on Socket.io reconnect
tasks.description: When Socket.io reconnects after a disconnect, fetch messages newer than the last displayed message from the REST API and merge them into the MessageList. Currently if the connection drops for 30 seconds, those messages are lost until page refresh. Add a reconnect handler in useSocket that triggers a catch-up fetch.

tasks.title: Add health check endpoint
tasks.description: Create GET /api/health that returns { status: 'ok', uptime: process.uptime(), dbOk: true/false }. Check DB connectivity with a simple Prisma query. Used by monitoring, load balancers, and the deploy verification step. Should respond in <100ms.

tasks.title: Add camera toggle to voice channels
tasks.description: Update VoiceChannel component to add a camera toggle IconButton (Videocam/VideocamOff). Call localParticipant.setCameraEnabled(). Update the LiveKitRoom to include video={true}. Render video tracks for participants who have camera on — show their video in a tile grid instead of just an avatar. Participants with camera off still show avatar.

tasks.title: Add screen sharing to voice channels
tasks.description: Update VoiceChannel component to add a ScreenShare IconButton. Call localParticipant.setScreenShareEnabled() to toggle. Render screen share tracks prominently — when someone is sharing, show their screen as a large video element above the participant grid. Only one person can share at a time. Show a 'X is sharing their screen' indicator.

tasks.title: Add deafen toggle to voice channels
tasks.description: Add a deafen IconButton (Headset/HeadsetOff) next to the mic toggle in VoiceChannel. When deafened, mute all incoming audio (set volume to 0 on RoomAudioRenderer or disable audio tracks). Also auto-mute mic when deafening (same as Discord behavior). Show deafen icon on participant tile when deafened.
